title: Fragrant Herbal Middle Eastern Pasta
description: A keto-friendly, crowd-pleasing Middle Eastern dish featuring bowtie pasta, fragrant herbs, and a glassy-jelly texture, all wrapped in a lotus leaf.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the bowtie pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the minced garlic until fragrant.
Add the chopped parsley and dill to the skillet and cook until wilted.
In a large bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked pasta to the bowl and toss with the lemon juice mixture until well coated.
Stir in the wilted herb mixture and toss until the pasta is well combined.
To assemble the dish, lay a lotus leaf flat and place a portion of the pasta mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the lotus leaf over the pasta to form a tight package and steam for 5-7 minutes.
Serve the fragrant herbal pasta hot, garnished with additional parsley and dill if desired.
